question: Please show the first names of the students that have at least two answer records.
sql: SELECT First_Name FROM Students WHERE Student_ID IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers GROUP BY Student_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) ORDER BY First_Name;

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的学生姓名
filters: Student_ID IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers GROUP BY Student_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求获取至少有两个回答记录的学生姓名，SQL描述通过子查询筛选出满足条件的Student_ID，并从Students表中获取对应的First_Name。排序字段order_by可能为额外要求，但未影响核心逻辑。
